prerequisites: A CQC developer portal account. The portal is at https://api-portal.service.cqc.org.uk.
API access through the CQC developer portal, which is used to authenticate and obtain your CQC API key (CQC Primary Key).
An API client that uses TLS 1.2 or higher, because the CQC API no longer supports TLS 1.0 or TLS 1.1.
The api_key value (your CQC Primary Key) ready to enter into the connector configuration.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single secret field, api_key. This is the CQC Primary Key obtained through the CQC developer portal. Requests go to https://api.service.cqc.org.uk, and the CQC requires all API users to authenticate.

setupSteps.title: Create a CQC developer portal account
setupSteps.body: The CQC API has migrated and now requires every user to authenticate. Go to the CQC developer portal at https://api-portal.service.cqc.org.uk and create an account.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your CQC API key
setupSteps.body: Through the CQC developer portal, obtain your CQC API key (CQC Primary Key). See https://www.cqc.org.uk/about-us/transparency/using-cqc-data for instructions on using the developer portal to authenticate.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the issued key into the required api_key field. This is the only configuration field for this source. Ensure your client uses TLS 1.2 or higher to connect to https://api.service.cqc.org.uk.

sources.title: Airbyte source connector: Care Quality Commission
